description_long: This is a modern, multi-story urban house with a flat roof and a mix of brick and concrete exterior finishes. The building features large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The ground floor includes a covered carport, a main entrance with a glass door, and a commercial storefront with a red awning. There are several balconies and rooftop terraces with greenery, enhancing the building's contemporary aesthetic. The property is bordered by sidewalks and includes street-facing trees and parked vehicles, indicating its integration into a city neighborhood. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, multi-story urban house with a flat roof, brick and concrete exterior, large windows, and multiple balconies and terraces. Features include a carport, storefront, and landscaped outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, red awning over a storefront, and street-facing trees and vehicles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, large windows, rooftop terraces, and a white van parked on the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying private balconies, rooftop gardens, and a more enclosed, residential aspect of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional balconies, flat roof sections, and the overall massing of the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a glass door, covered carport, and a red awning over a commercial storefront; no steps, minimalistic modern design.
